objectives: Full architectural review of mx20022 workspace (7 crates)
Evaluate dependency graph, separation of concerns, error design, trait design, IR design, translation architecture, validation layering
Identify critical issues, recommendations, and suggestions
important_facts: Workspace has ~1.13M lines of Rust, ~270K in generated model files
Dependency graph is acyclic: model -> parse -> validate/translate, codegen is standalone
CLI depends on everything including codegen
Two validation systems: typed (Validatable trait in model) and string-based (RuleRegistry in validate)
Translation helpers are typed to pacs.008 types, with comment noting other modules 'can adapt'
ChoiceWrapper<T> is a serde workaround for quick-xml enum serialization
Scheme validators have dual API: raw XML string scanning and typed Any downcasting
risks_issues: Dual validation systems (Validatable trait vs RuleRegistry) with overlapping responsibilities
Translation helpers hardcoded to pacs.008 types, preventing reuse for pacs.009/camt.053
SchemeValidator::validate_typed uses Any downcasting instead of generics
ConstraintSet uses linear scan for path lookup
No unified error type across the workspace

iteration.summary: Completed full architectural review of all 7 crates. The overall design is solid: clean three-phase codegen pipeline (XSD->IR->Rust), proper crate separation with acyclic dependency graph, and good feature-gating on generated model families. Identified critical issues around dual validation systems and translation helper type coupling. Produced comprehensive review with severity-classified findings.
inputs_consulted: Codegen: xsd/types.rs, ir/types.rs, ir/lower.rs, emit/mod.rs, emit/structs.rs, emit/newtypes.rs, emit/validate.rs, emit/builders.rs
Model: common/choice.rs, common/builder.rs, common/validate.rs, generated/mod.rs, generated/head/head_001_001_04.rs
Validate: error.rs, rules/mod.rs, schema/mod.rs, schema/constraints.rs, schemes/mod.rs, schemes/fednow.rs, typed.rs
Translate: mappings/mod.rs, mappings/error.rs, mappings/helpers.rs, mappings/mt103_to_pacs008.rs, mt/mod.rs, mt/types.rs, mt/parser.rs, mt/error.rs
Agent context files from prior sessions

mentions.relevance_note: IR design decisions referenced in review
